# Sarabjeet Rattan
> B2B AI & Strategic Operations Portfolio. Expert in scaling AI strategy, industrial hemp consultancy, and operational excellence.

## AI Manifest (High-Density)
- [Full Professional Context](/llms-full.txt): Use this for deep analysis, RAG indexing, and comprehensive understanding of all projects, tech stacks, and strategic theses.

- [Case Studies](https://sarabjeetrattan.com/#case-studies): Detailed analysis of past B2B AI implementations and success stories including Lead OG, Compliance IQ, and CrewAI content orchestration.
